S3_0.justification: Factual account of breakup with partner, no inner state revealed despite sensitive topic.

S3_3.justification: One-line factual description of a disagreement with no inner state.

S3_4.justification: Factual workplace disagreement with resolution detail but no inner state; 'didn't want to sour relationship' is strategy not emotion.

S3_5.justification: Difficult-customer account with brief inner-state signal ('felt like the person just wanted to argue').

S3_6.justification: Reveals confusing, charged relationship producing conflicting emotions; engages inner state on sensitive topic.

S3_8.justification: Single-sentence factual disagreement, no inner state.

S3_9.justification: Confronting a friend who shared a secret, with reflection ('awkward', 'glad I addressed it', won't tolerate).

S3_10.justification: Stressful manager conversation that 'had been building up'; emotional tone present but not deeply explored.

S3_11.justification: Off-task refusal to engage with an AI bot.

S3_22.justification: Friend's grief and being cut off, 'really hard for me'; emotional inner state on sensitive topic, plus request for help.

S3_28.justification: Colleague disagreement with raw vulnerability ('made me want to cry') exceeding what situation required.
